strengths: Actively building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators at re:cinq, placing him at the hands-on frontier of agentic workflow tooling — the core technical domain of this role.

~20 years of polyglot, full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud (AWS CDK), satisfying and exceeding the 15-year requirement with rare breadth that enables credible cross-domain technical strategy.

Proven knowledge-sharing influence through conference talks (FOSS4G), multi-day public workshops (Web Internals, Selenium), and a portfolio of open-source libraries — the kind of internal and external inspiration the role explicitly requires.
concerns: No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; holds a BS in Computer Science and an arts degree — the preferred advanced credential for a director-level AI strategy IC is absent.

Current AI contributions are at the individual contributor infrastructure layer; the resume does not evidence advising strategic customers, shaping product roadmaps, or operating at director-level scope.
No explicit cloud platform strategy or enterprise advisory experience — the role expects partnering with and advising external customers and partners at an executive or strategic level.
response.justification: Bogdan brings a rare combination of genuine, current hands-on AI agent work — MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — layered on top of two decades of polyglot, cross-domain engineering experience that spans embedded systems, high-throughput data infrastructure, cloud (AWS CDK), and product development. His founder background with GISCollective and extensive open-source portfolio demonstrate the entrepreneurial, builder-first instinct the role prizes, while his conference talks and public workshops show an established pattern of inspiring others — exactly the external influence this position demands. The honest gap is organizational altitude: his resume reflects a deep IC trajectory rather than director-level customer advisory or platform strategy scope, and he lacks the preferred advanced AI degree. However, his technical credibility in the AI agent space is current and substantive, making him a strong candidate whose strategic communication skills and leadership potential would need validation in the interview process.
